g.text: CS PULL-UPS KEEP ALL IMUS DESELECTED WHILE DK IS OFF, RESETTING, BOOTING, HALTED, OR DISCONNECTED

g.desc: CS PULL-UPS KEEP ALL IMUS DESELECTED WHILE DK IS OFF, RESETTING, BOOTING, HALTED, OR DISCONNECTED

g.text: SPI5 initial firmware: MODE 3, IDLE HIGH, SOFTWARE NSS, 100 kHz-1 MHz. Final speed requires signal-integrity validation.

g.desc: SPI5 initial firmware: MODE 3, IDLE HIGH, SOFTWARE NSS, 100 kHz-1 MHz. Final speed requires signal-integrity validation.

g.text: J16 JST ZE INT1 [III] circuits/cavities: 1 THUMB, 2 GND, 3 INDEX, 4 MIDDLE, 5 RING, 6 PINKY.

g.desc: J16 JST ZE INT1 [III] circuits/cavities: 1 THUMB, 2 GND, 3 INDEX, 4 MIDDLE, 5 RING, 6 PINKY.

g.text: R18-R22 = 10k to +3V3_IMU on glove side. PROVISIONAL - PHYSICAL RESET/BACKFEED VALIDATION REQUIRED.

g.desc: R18-R22 = 10k to +3V3_IMU on glove side. PROVISIONAL - PHYSICAL RESET/BACKFEED VALIDATION REQUIRED.

g.text: ISM330DHCX INT1: active-high push-pull. MCU inputs: no internal pull. EXTI: thumb 10, index 5, middle 9, ring 0, pinky 11.

g.desc: ISM330DHCX INT1: active-high push-pull. MCU inputs: no internal pull. EXTI: thumb 10, index 5, middle 9, ring 0, pinky 11.

g.text: NOT PHYSICALLY QUALIFIED / NOT WEARABLE QUALIFIED / NOT FOR FABRICATION

g.desc: NOT PHYSICALLY QUALIFIED / NOT WEARABLE QUALIFIED / NOT FOR FABRICATION

g.text: CN7 DNC: pins 1,2,3,5,6. CN11 DNC: pins 1,2. CN12 DNC: pins 8 AREF, 9 SDA, 10 SCL.

g.desc: CN7 DNC: pins 1,2,3,5,6. CN11 DNC: pins 1,2. CN12 DNC: pins 8 AREF, 9 SDA, 10 SCL.

g.text: CN8-2 IOREF, CN8-4 3V3, CN8-5 5V, CN8-8 VIN: EXPLICIT NO-CONNECT. CN8-1 NC and CN8-3 RESET also DNC.

g.desc: CN8-2 IOREF, CN8-4 3V3, CN8-5 5V, CN8-8 VIN: EXPLICIT NO-CONNECT. CN8-1 NC and CN8-3 RESET also DNC.

g.text: PCB_GLOVE POWERED THROUGH J9 EXTERNAL INPUT ONLY

g.desc: PCB_GLOVE POWERED THROUGH J9 EXTERNAL INPUT ONLY

g.text: DK POSITIVE POWER PINS MUST NOT CONNECT TO PCB_GLOVE

g.desc: DK POSITIVE POWER PINS MUST NOT CONNECT TO PCB_GLOVE

g.text: STM32N6570-DK FOUR-CONNECTOR DIGITAL INTERFACE - DRAFT DEVELOPMENT HARDWARE

g.desc: STM32N6570-DK FOUR-CONNECTOR DIGITAL INTERFACE - DRAFT DEVELOPMENT HARDWARE

g.text: J14 JST ZE SPI [I] circuits/cavities: 1 SCK, 2 GND, 3 MISO, 4 GND, 5 MOSI, 6 DNC / NO TERMINAL.

g.desc: J14 JST ZE SPI [I] circuits/cavities: 1 SCK, 2 GND, 3 MISO, 4 GND, 5 MOSI, 6 DNC / NO TERMINAL.

g.text: J15 JST ZE CS_N [II] circuits/cavities: 1 THUMB, 2 GND, 3 INDEX, 4 MIDDLE, 5 RING, 6 PINKY.

g.desc: J15 JST ZE CS_N [II] circuits/cavities: 1 THUMB, 2 GND, 3 INDEX, 4 MIDDLE, 5 RING, 6 PINKY.

g.text: IDENTICAL JST ZE 6P PORTS: J14 SPI [I] / J15 CS_N [II] / J16 INT1 [III]. VERIFY GROUP. NO HOT-PLUG. PHYSICAL KEYING OPEN.

g.desc: IDENTICAL JST ZE 6P PORTS: J14 SPI [I] / J15 CS_N [II] / J16 INT1 [III]. VERIFY GROUP. NO HOT-PLUG. PHYSICAL KEYING OPEN.
